issue: "during the 9 a.m. through 8 p.m. and 10 p.m. hours" is clunky; the trailing hour set jammed onto a range reads awkwardly
"at 9 a.m. through 8 p.m. and at 10 p.m." is stilted; repeated month list (Jan/Apr/Jul/Oct) on both branches is verbose
June 31 does not exist; schedule never fires, but rendering states "on June 31" as if it does, misleading the reader
comma placement "or on Sunday, in January and July" is slightly awkward but scoping is clear
"from 9 a.m. through 8:05 p.m." mixes a top-of-hour bound with a :05 bound, slightly jarring
6-field cron botched: hour is * (every hour) not the 9th; "9 a.m. hour" misreads dom=9; "1st through 5th" misreads month field 1-5 (Jan-May) as days of month; whole day/month structure wrong
"from midnight through 12:50 a.m." for a single-hour minute range is wordy; long sentence
long; minute-range plus two-branch or-clause packs a lot into one sentence
very long; repeated four-month list on both or-branches is heavy to parse
